passwordMin4: Password must be at least 4 characters
descriptionMin50: Description must be at least 50 characters
galleryMin: Add at least one gallery image
explainIdRejected: Explain why the ID was rejected
slugFormat: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and single hyphens only
suspensionReasonMin: Provide a suspension reason (at least 3 characters).
applicantReasonMin: Provide a short reason for the applicant
jsonRootMustBeObject: Root JSON value must be an object.
